prompt:
Which feature slows oxygen ingress at high temperature?
A. Chromium-rich oxide scales
B. Cooling fins
C. Vacuum seals
D. Random sampling

Return exactly one uppercase option letter. Do not include explanation.

Which condition pair increases creep rate?
A. Lower stress and lower temperature
B. Higher temperature and higher applied stress
C. Shorter dwell time
D. More grain pinning

Return exactly one uppercase option letter. Do not include explanation.

Where does crack initiation often begin under cyclic loading?
A. Surface defects
B. Bibliography entries
C. Dataset cards
D. Model names

Return exactly one uppercase option letter. Do not include explanation.

Which process can strengthen precipitation-hardened alloys?
A. Removing all metadata
B. Solution treatment followed by aging
C. Changing qrels column order
D. Deleting corpus ids

Return exactly one uppercase option letter. Do not include explanation.

Which statements are supported by the example corpus?
A. Fine precipitates impede dislocation motion
B. Fine precipitates improve high-temperature strength
C. Creep rate ignores stress
D. Oxide scales can slow oxygen ingress
E. All cracks start at grain centers

Return sorted uppercase option letters separated by commas, such as A,C,D. Do not include explanation.

Fine precipitates impede ____ motion.

Return only the missing text. Do not include explanation.
